title: Baseball Analytics Data Platform
description: Built a scalable BigQuery warehouse for MLB data.

title: Monte Carlo Managerial Engines
description: ML-driven decision engines for baseball simulation.

title: Pitcher Pull Prediction Model
description: Predicts when a pitcher should be pulled.

title: Sports Email Scheduler
description: Built an automated system that checks whether a user's favorite teams are playing each day and emails them the game time if they are scheduled to play.
highlights: Used sports schedule data to identify whether selected teams play on a given day.
Built an automated email notification system using Python and SMTP.
Scheduled the script to run daily so users receive game-time updates automatically.
Created a simple interface for users to manage favorite teams and email preferences.
